an1.10:1.1: "I see no other single touch, *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*] as the touch of a man.
an1.10:1.2: The touch of a man, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*]."
an1.10:1.4: The first chapter, on form [*rūpa*] and so forth.
an1.1:0.2: 1. The Chapter on Form [*Rūpa*] and So Forth
an1.1:1.2: at one time the *Bhagavā* was dwelling at Sāvatthī, in Jeta's Grove, the monastery of Anāthapiṇḍika.
an1.1:2.1: "I see no other single form [*rūpa*], *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*] as the form [*rūpa*] of a woman.
an1.1:2.2: The form [*rūpa*] of a woman, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*]."
an1.2:1.1: "I see no other single sound, *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*] as the sound of a woman.
an1.2:1.2: The sound of a woman, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*]."
an1.3:1.1: "I see no other single smell, *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*] as the smell of a woman.
an1.3:1.2: The smell of a woman, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*]."
an1.4:1.1: "I see no other single taste, *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*] as the taste of a woman.
an1.4:1.2: The taste of a woman, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*]."
an1.5:1.1: "I see no other single touch, *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*] as the touch of a woman.
an1.5:1.2: The touch of a woman, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a man's mind [*citta*]."
an1.6:1.1: "I see no other single form [*rūpa*], *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*] as the form [*rūpa*] of a man.
an1.6:1.2: The form [*rūpa*] of a man, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*]."
an1.7:1.1: "I see no other single sound, *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*] as the sound of a man.
an1.7:1.2: The sound of a man, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*]."
an1.8:1.1: "I see no other single smell, *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*] as the smell of a man.
an1.8:1.2: The smell of a man, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*]."
an1.9:1.1: "I see no other single taste, *bhikkhus*, that so occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*] as the taste of a man.
an1.9:1.2: The taste of a man, *bhikkhus*, occupies and holds a woman's mind [*citta*]."
